name: CapAllianz Holdings Limited
summary: CWX Global Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas in Singapore and Thailand. It operates in two segments, Oil and Gas, and Investment and Trading. The company primarily holds 20% interest in three producing concessions, including SW1, L44/43, and L33/43 located in Phetchabun Basin, Thailand. It also invests in private equity deals; pre-initial public offerings; initial public offerings; and fixed income and hybrid instruments; and trades in equities, commodities, and other financial instruments. The company was formerly known as Loyz Energy Limited and changed its name to CWX Global Limited in October 2017. CWX Global Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Singapore.
